title: Measuring Agents in Production

primary_source.comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026) as Oral Presentation

version_drift_evidence.v4_abstract_population_wording: surveyed 86 deployed systems practitioners across 26 domains
version_drift_evidence.v4_body_boundary: The v4 body states that 306 valid survey responses were collected and the main analysis filters to 86 production-or-pilot systems; Appendix D reports the full survey dataset. A reviewer must audit whether this is clarification, estimand change, or both rather than treating either abstract count as the complete sampling frame.

openreview.observed_response: OpenReview API returned HTTP 403 ChallengeRequiredError; the forum returned a Cloudflare Turnstile verification page and the PDF endpoint returned HTTP 403. No forum record, reviews, decisions, or OpenReview PDF were preserved or treated as inspected evidence.
openreview.search_index_only: A web search result identifies the forum title and describes an older 306-practitioner abstract. This is discovery metadata only, not preserved review evidence.

checks: arXiv API returned immutable v4 metadata and a non-withdrawn abstract
PDF metadata reports the expected title, complete 25-author byline, 47 pages, and 1,290,191 bytes
layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from title/abstract through Appendix G survey flow
v4 extraction contains the study methodology, appendices, complete survey question tables, and final page
immutable v3 PDF and full-text extraction were separately preserved for the queued version-drift audit

claim_boundary: This acquisition creates full-text evidence only. It is not a deep review and makes no claim about representativeness, intervention efficacy, professional validity, capability, safety, production fitness, or readiness.
